included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrive in Munnar & Misty Tea Estates
itinerary.description: Arrive in Munnar and check in. Walk through the sprawling green tea gardens, visit Mattupetty Dam, and spot rare Nilgiri Tahrs at Eravikulam National Park.

itinerary.title: Spice Plantations & Periyar Boat Safari in Thekkady
itinerary.description: Drive to Thekkady. Take a guided boat safari on Periyar Lake to watch for wild elephants, and tour a local cardamom and pepper plantation.

itinerary.title: Wagamon Meadows & Pine Forest to Alleppey
itinerary.description: Explore the quiet hill station of Wagamon, walking through the pine forest and green meadows. Later, drive down to the backwaters of Alleppey.

itinerary.title: Alleppey Houseboat Cruise & Departure
itinerary.description: Board a traditional luxury houseboat. Cruise through narrow canals lined with coconut palms, enjoy authentic Kerala meals, and transfer for departure.

title: Munnar, Thekkady & Alleppey: Highlands & Backwaters
description: Experience the classic Kerala highlands and backwaters circuit. Trek Munnar's tea estates, enjoy a wildlife boating safari in Periyar Lake (Thekkady), walk the pine forests of Wagamon, and cruise on a traditional Alleppey houseboat.
highlights: Walk through the tea estates and echo points of Munnar
Take a guided wildlife safari on Periyar Lake in Thekkady
Walk through the serene Pine Forest and green meadows of Wagamon
Overnight cruise and traditional meals on an Alleppey houseboat
